programmes.show_description: 5/5. From the ruins of Arecibo to the silent far side of the Moon. As Earth grows noisier, radio astronomers consider relocating. Read by Jasmine Hyde.

programmes.show_name: Licence to Hate - Racism on the Front Line
programmes.show_description: Frontline healthcare workers describe racist abuse from their patients.

programmes.show_name: Kenneth Williams: Said the Actor to the Bishop
programmes.show_description: At the height of his fame in the 1970s, Kenneth Williams was asked to record excerpts from the Bible. Those recordings haven't been broadcast until now.
